promotions.coupon_external_help: This promotion type generates an external coupon to be used in the associated store. Just define the discount type and amount, days and time of validity.
promotions.label: Promotions
promotions.no_promotion_selected: Please select a promotion to update
promotions.name: Promotion Name
promotions.name_tooltip: The name of the promotion displayed to users
promotions.description_tooltip: A brief description of the promotion
promotions.invalid_discount: Discount amount must be greater than 0
promotions.menu_item_sku_tooltip: Select the menu item for product-based promotions
promotions.locations_tooltip: Select the locations where the promotion is valid
promotions.display_start_tooltip: When the promotion starts being visible to users (at least 5 days before claim start)
promotions.display_end_tooltip: When the promotion stops being visible to users
promotions.claim_start_tooltip: When users can start claiming the coupon
promotions.claim_end_tooltip: When users can no longer claim the coupon
promotions.validity_tooltip: How the coupon's validity is determined
promotions.recurring_days_tooltip: Days when the coupon is valid for recurring promotions
promotions.recurring_from_time_tooltip: Start time for recurring promotions (Chile time)
promotions.recurring_to_time_tooltip: End time for recurring promotions (Chile time)
promotions.excluded_dates_tooltip: Specific dates when the coupon is not valid (e.g., Christmas)
promotions.token_rule_tooltip: Require users to hold or burn tokens to claim the promotion

rules.type_tooltip: Choose whether users must hold or burn tokens
rules.max_one_burn_rule: Only one burn tokens rule is allowed per promotion

promotions.max_coupon_per_promo_tooltip: Total coupons available for the promotion
promotions.birthday_validity_days_note: Number of days before/after birthday for redemption
promotions.missing_sku: Menu item SKU is required for product promotions
promotions.missing_locations: At least one location is required
promotions.invalid_birthday_validity: Birthday coupon must have BIRTHDAY validity type
promotions.invalid_display_dates: Invalid display dates: start must be before end
promotions.invalid_claim_dates: Invalid claim dates: start must be before end
promotions.invalid_redeem_dates: Invalid redeem dates: start must be before end
promotions.display_before_claim: Display start must be at least 5 days before claim start
promotions.missing_recurring_days: Recurring promotions require at least one valid day
promotions.invalid_token_rule: Token rule requires a valid address and amount
